lines.speaker: Cabin Boy Herbert
lines.text: Hey there. If you need something, you should speak to Veos. I'm just the cabin boy.

sections.title: After completing X Marks the Spot, if the player has not yet claimed their clue scroll

lines.speaker: Cabin Boy Herbert
lines.text: Hey. Veos left something for you. Here you go.

sections.title: First conversation after completing A Kingdom Divided

lines.speaker: Cabin Boy Herbert
lines.text: I'm afraid that you're not eligible to travel to Great Kourend at the moment. Come back when you are and I'll happily take you there.

lines.speaker: Cabin Boy Herbert
lines.text: Where would you like to go?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'd like to travel to Port Sarim, please.

lines.speaker: Cabin Boy Herbert
lines.text: As you wish, I hope you don't get seasick, it is a long voyage.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'd like to travel to Port Piscarilius, please.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'd like to travel to Land's End, please.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Actually I'd like to stay here.

sections.title: Subsequent conversations after completing A Kingdom Divided

lines.speaker: Cabin Boy Herbert
lines.text: Hey there. Do you need something?
